name: Valkyrie
text: Death Perception — Hero Action: Play the set-aside Death-Glow upgrade as if it were in your hand.
real_text: Death Perception — Hero Action: Play the set-aside Death-Glow upgrade as if it were in your hand.
flavor: "I am the chooser of the slain."

linked_card.name: Brunnhilde
linked_card.text:
Setup: Set the Death Glow upgrade aside, out of play.

"Not this Day." — Action: Detach Death-Glow and set it aside, out of play.
linked_card.real_text: Setup: Set the Death Glow upgrade aside, out of play. "Not this Day." — Action: Detach Death-Glow and set it aside, out of play.

name: Death-Glow
text: Attach to an enemy. Forced Interrupt: When attached enemy is defeated, set this card aside, out of play. If Valkyrie defeated that enemy, ready her.
real_text: Attach to an enemy. Forced Interrupt: When attached enemy is defeated, set this card aside, out of play. If Valkyrie defeated that enemy, ready her.

name: Annabelle Riggs
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Annabelle Riggs → search the top 5 cards of your deck for a Valkyrie card and add it to your hand. Shuffle the rest back into your deck.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Annabelle Riggs → search the top 5 cards of your deck for a Valkyrie card and add it to your hand. Shuffle the rest back into your deck.
flavor: "I've got friends on Earth who could use some help."

name: Valhalla
text: Response: After Valkyrie attacks and defeats the enemy that has Death-Glow attached, exhaust Valhalla → draw 1 card and heal 1 damage from Valkyrie.
real_text: Response: After Valkyrie attacks and defeats the enemy that has Death-Glow attached, exhaust Valhalla → draw 1 card and heal 1 damage from Valkyrie.

name: Valkyrie's Spear
text:
Restricted.
Valkyrie gets +1 DEF (+2 DEF instead while defending against the enemy with Death Glow attached).
real_text:
Restricted.
Valkyrie gets +1 DEF (+2 DEF instead while defending against the enemy with Death Glow attached).

name: Dragonfang
text:
Restricted.
Valkyrie gets +1 ATK (+2 ATK instead while attacking the enemy with Death-Glow attached).
real_text:
Restricted.
Valkyrie gets +1 ATK (+2 ATK instead while attacking the enemy with Death-Glow attached).
flavor: "Dragonfang strikes swiftly and deep. You might be wise to surrender." —Valkyrie

name: Aragorn
text: You get +4 hit points and gains the [[aerial]] trait.
real_text: You get +4 hit points and gains the [[aerial]] trait.
flavor: "A fearless beast. If by his life or death he can save us all, he will." —Valkyrie

name: Flight of the Valkyrior
text: Response: After the enemy with Death-Glow is defeated, discard Flight of the Valkyrior → remove 5 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Response: After the enemy with Death-Glow is defeated, discard Flight of the Valkyrior → remove 5 threat from a scheme.
flavor: The Valkyrior carry the spirits of fallen warriors to Valhalla, if they be worthy.

name: Visit Valhalla
text: Alter-Ego Action: Return a Valkyrie card from your discard pile to your hand.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Return a Valkyrie card from your discard pile to your hand.
flavor: As One of the Valkyrior, Valkyrie can open a portal to Valhalla whenever she wishes.

name: Chooser of the Slain
text: Hero Action: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a minion and put it into play engaged with you → draw 2 cards.
real_text: Hero Action: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a minion and put it into play engaged with you → draw 2 cards.
flavor: "Your time has come. Die with honor." —Valkyrie

name: Shieldmaiden
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When the enemy with Death-Glow attached attacks, declare Valkyrie the defender without exhausting her. She gets +2 DEF for this attack.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When the enemy with Death-Glow attached attacks, declare Valkyrie the defender without exhausting her. She gets +2 DEF for this attack.

name: Have at Thee!
text: Hero Action(attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. If that enemy has Death-Glow attached, this attack gains overkill.
real_text: Hero Action(attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. If that enemy has Death-Glow attached, this attack gains overkill.

name: Thor
text: Toughness. Interrupt: When Thor attacks a minion engaged with a player, spend a [energy] resource → resolve this attack against each minion engaged with that player (in the order of your choice).
real_text: Toughness. Interrupt: When Thor attacks a minion engaged with a player, spend a [energy] resource → resolve this attack against each minion engaged with that player (in the order of your choice).

name: Throg
text: Response: After Throg enters play, give him a tough status card if you are engaged with a minion.
real_text: Response: After Throg enters play, give him a tough status card if you are engaged with a minion.

name: Angela
text: Forced Response: After Angela enters play under your control, search the top 10 cards of the encounter deck for a minion and put it into play engaged with you. Shuffle the encounter deck. If a minion was not put into play this way, discard Angela.
real_text: Forced Response: After Angela enters play under your control, search the top 10 cards of the encounter deck for a minion and put it into play engaged with you. Shuffle the encounter deck. If a minion was not put into play this way, discard Angela.

name: Hall of Heroes
text: Response: After you defeat a minion, place 1 glory counter here. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Hall of Heroes and remove 3 glory counters from it → draw 3 cards.
real_text: Response: After you defeat a minion, place 1 glory counter here. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Hall of Heroes and remove 3 glory counters from it → draw 3 cards.

name: Combat Training
text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 ATK.
real_text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 ATK.
flavor: "Tony! She did it again!" —Janet Van Dyne

name: Quick Strike
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal damage to an enemy equal to your ATK.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal damage to an enemy equal to your ATK.

name: Smash the Problem
text: Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust your hero → remove threat from a scheme equal to your hero's ATK.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust your hero → remove threat from a scheme equal to your hero's ATK.

name: The Best Defense…
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When your hero defends against an attack, use its ATK instead of its DEF for this attack.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When your hero defends against an attack, use its ATK instead of its DEF for this attack.
flavor: "I know we're Guardians of the Galaxy, but we prefer shooting to being shot at." —Rocket Raccoon

name: Audacity
text: Max 1 per deck. Hero Response: After you spend this card, deal 1 damage to the villain.
real_text: Max 1 per deck. Hero Response: After you spend this card, deal 1 damage to the villain.

name: The Power of Aggression
text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Aggression (red) card.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Aggression (red) card.

name: The Bifrost
text: Play only if your identity has the [[asgard]] trait. Action: Exhaust The Bifrost → search your deck for an [[asgard]] ally and play it (paying its cost). Shuffle your deck.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[asgard]] trait. Action: Exhaust The Bifrost → search your deck for an [[asgard]] ally and play it (paying its cost). Shuffle your deck.

real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[asgard]] trait. Action: Heal 2 damage from your identity. You may discard a status card from your identity.

real_text: Max 1 per deck.

text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

real_text: Max 1 per deck.

real_text: Give to the Brunnhilde player. Valkyrie cannot attack the enemy with Death-Glow attached. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [energy][mental] resources → remove Trouble in Otherworld from the game.

name: Enchantress
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck, discard pile, and set-aside area for a copy of Seduced and attach it to your identity. (Shuffle.)
real_text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck, discard pile, and set-aside area for a copy of Seduced and attach it to your identity. (Shuffle.)

name: Powerful Enchantments
text:
Hinder 1[per_hero].
Players cannot discard attachments that are attached to friendly characters.
real_text:
Hinder 1[per_hero].
Players cannot discard attachments that are attached to friendly characters.
flavor: Behind Amora's charm lies a cruel ambition and the power to subdue those in her way.

name: Beguiled
text: Treat attached ally as an [[enthralled]] minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW and it does not take consequential damage. When Revealed: Attach to the ally with the highest cost without Beguiled attached. Attached ally engages its controller. Otherwise, this card gains surge.
real_text: Treat attached ally as an [[enthralled]] minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW and it does not take consequential damage. name: Seduced
text: Attach to your identity. You cannot make basic attacks or play [[attack]] events. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [energy][mental] resources → discard this card.
real_text: Attach to your identity. You cannot make basic attacks or play [[attack]] events. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [energy][mental] resources → discard this card.

real_text: Alliance. Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust an [[avenger]] character and a [[guardian]] character → remove X threat from each scheme, where X is equal to the combined THW of those characters.

text: Max 2 per deck. Uses (2 training counters). Alter-ego Action: Exhaust this card and remove 1 training counter from it → choose a leadership (blue) event in you discard pile and shuffle it into your deck.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Uses (2 training counters). Alter-ego Action: Exhaust this card and remove 1 training counter from it → choose a leadership (blue) event in you discard pile and shuffle it into your deck.

real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Interrupt: When you engage a minion, discard this card → ready your hero.
